title: Trigger AI Agent with Amazon EventBridge Scheduler
description: Create a EventBridge scheduler which invokes a Bedrock Agent upon triggering.

introBox.headline: How it works
text: This pattern demonstrates how to trigger an Amazon Bedrock AI Agent on a recurring schedule using Amazon EventBridge Scheduler. An orchestrator AWS Lambda function, invoked by the scheduler, sends a task payload to the Bedrock Agent, which processes the input, generates an execution summary, and persists the result to a DynamoDB table via an action group Lambda. The pattern includes retry logic, a dead-letter queue for failed invocations, and least-privilege IAM policies scoped to the agent alias ARN.

bullets.text: Invoke a Lambda function on a schedule
Allow users to view information about and invoke an agent

text: See the GitHub repo for detailed testing instructions.
